description: Add Capacitor configuration and Android project structure to convert the Vite web app into a Capacitor Android application, including splash screen resources, app icons, and a GitHub Actions workflow for building APKs.
steps: Update package.json to add Capacitor dependencies (@capacitor/core, @capacitor/cli, @capacitor/android) and a 'cap sync' script
Create capacitor.config.ts at project root with appId: com.lifeframe.app, appName: Lifeframe, webDir: dist
Create android/build.gradle (project-level Gradle build file with Android Gradle plugin, Google services, Kotlin plugin)
Create android/settings.gradle with include ':app'
Create android/gradle.properties with standard Android properties
Create android/gradle/wrapper/gradle-wrapper.properties pointing to Gradle 8.x distribution
Create android/app/build.gradle with compileSdk 34, minSdk 22, targetSdk 34, applicationId com.lifeframe.app, Capacitor dependencies
Create android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml with internet permission, main activity declaration pointing to com.lifeframe.app.MainActivity
Create android/app/src/main/java/com/lifeframe/app/MainActivity.java extending BridgeActivity
Create android/app/src/main/res/values/strings.xml with app_name Lifeframe
Create android/app/src/main/res/values/styles.xml with AppTheme and splash screen theme
Create android/app/src/main/res/values/colors.xml with brand colors
Create android/app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml with the Capacitor bridge layout
Create android/app/src/main/res/drawable/splash.xml with a placeholder splash screen drawable
Create android/app/src/main/res/drawable/ic_launcher_foreground.xml with a placeholder vector drawable
Create android/app/src/main/res/drawable/ic_launcher_background.xml with brand color background
Create android/app/src/main/res/mipmap-hdpi/, mipmap-mdpi/, mipmap-xhdpi/, mipmap-xxhdpi/, mipmap-xxxhdpi/ directories with ic_launcher.xml adaptive icon references
Create android/app/src/main/res/mipmap-anydpi-v26/ic_launcher.xml adaptive icon manifest
Create android/variables.gradle with SDK and Capacitor version variables
Update .gitignore to add Android-specific ignores (android/.gradle/, android/app/build/, etc.)

Create .github/workflows/build-apk.yml that: triggers on push, sets up Java 17, sets up Node.js, installs dependencies, runs vite build, runs npx cap sync android, builds debug APK with ./gradlew assembleDebug in android/ directory, uploads APK artifact
acceptance_criteria: capacitor.config.ts exists with correct appId, appName, and webDir
android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml is valid with correct package and permissions
android/app/build.gradle has correct compileSdk, minSdk, targetSdk, and applicationId
Splash screen and icon resources exist in res/ directories
All files are committed and pushed to GitHub
verification: Verify capacitor.config.ts exists and contains com.lifeframe.app
Verify android/app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml exists and is valid XML
Verify .github/workflows/build-apk.yml exists with correct triggers and steps
Run git status to confirm everything is committed
